title: Peppery Malayan Papaya Pilaf
description: This dish showcases a chewy, peppery twist on traditional Malay cuisine with the addition of cayenne pepper and a tadka to elevate its flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 1 cup grated ripe papaya
ingredients.notes: Use fresh, ripe papaya for best results.

ingredients.name: 3 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely and sautéed to infuse the dish with a subtle flavor.

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Add papaya, salt (to taste), cayenne pepper, and lemon juice to the pan. Stir gently.
Cover and cook for about 10-15 minutes or until papaya is tender but still chewy.
